<!-- Thanks for contributing to AILmanac! Keep PRs focused. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- One or two sentences. Link any related issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type

- [ ] Content (new page / edit / fix)
- [ ] Template or recipe
- [ ] Translation (i18n)
- [ ] Site code / tooling
- [ ] Upstream change (something Anthropic shipped)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally (no broken links).
- [ ] Pages start with a `<LevelBadge level="…" />`.
- [ ] Volatile facts (models/prices/limits/features) carry a `<VerifyNote lastVerified="YYYY-MM-DD" source="…" />` and cite the official source — no model facts hard-coded in prose.
- [ ] Internal links point to existing `/docs/...` paths; external links work.
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO).
- [ ] Tone follows the [Content Style Guide](../docs/contribute/style-guide).
